languages.text: "При всем уважении, там также сказано, что проявление трусости и бездействия, когда командованию угрожает опасность, также является предательством. Вы можете расстрелять нас за неповиновение, но мы вас не бросим".

"With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."
languages.original_text: "При всем уважении, там также сказано, что проявление трусости и бездействия, когда командованию угрожает опасность, также является предательством. Вы можете расстрелять нас за неповиновение, но мы вас не бросим".

traits.locale_text: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treachery. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

"With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treachery. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

"With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

"With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

languages.text: “恕我直言，《法典》里亦规定了在指挥官遇险时，怯懦与不作为同样构成叛变行为。您可以以违抗军令罪枪毙我们，但我们绝不会抛下您。”
languages.original_text: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

traits.locale_text: “恕我直言，《法典》里亦规定了在指挥官遇险时，怯懦与不作为同样构成叛变行为。您可以以违抗军令罪枪毙我们，但我们绝不会抛下您。”

languages.text: "Saygısızlık etmek istemem ama aynı maddeler, komuta kademesi tehlikedeyken gösterilen korkaklığın ve eylemsizliğin de ihanet teşkil ettiğini belirtiyor. İtaatsizlikten dolayı bizi vurdurabilirsiniz. Yine de sizi terk etmeyeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

traits.locale_text: "Saygısızlık etmek istemem ama aynı maddeler, komuta kademesi tehlikedeyken gösterilen korkaklığın ve eylemsizliğin de ihanet teşkil ettiğini belirtiyor. İtaatsizlikten dolayı bizi vurdurabilirsiniz. Yine de sizi terk etmeyeceğiz."

languages.text: « Sauf votre respect, ces mêmes articles comptent également pour actes de trahison la lâcheté et l'inaction lorsqu'un commandant est en danger. Vous pouvez nous fusiller pour insubordination, mais nous ne vous abandonnerons pas. »
languages.original_text: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

traits.locale_text: « Sauf votre respect, ces mêmes articles comptent également pour actes de trahison la lâcheté et l'inaction lorsqu'un commandant est en danger. Vous pouvez nous fusiller pour insubordination, mais nous ne vous abandonnerons pas. »

languages.text: «Con el debido respeto, otra sección del mismo código afirma que la cobardía y la pasividad cuando el oficial al mando corre peligro también constituye un acto de traición. Si quiere, háganos fusilar por insubordinación, pero no le abandonaremos».
languages.original_text: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

traits.locale_text: «Con el debido respeto, otra sección del mismo código afirma que la cobardía y la pasividad cuando el oficial al mando corre peligro también constituye un acto de traición. Si quiere, háganos fusilar por insubordinación, pero no le abandonaremos».

languages.text: "Bei allem Respekt, dieselben Artikel besagen auch, dass Feigheit und Untätigkeit im Angesicht der Gefahr für den Commander als Verrat gelten. Ihr könnt uns wegen Subordination erschießen lassen, aber wir weichen nicht von Eurer Seite."
languages.original_text: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

traits.locale_text: "Bei allem Respekt, dieselben Artikel besagen auch, dass Feigheit und Untätigkeit im Angesicht der Gefahr für den Commander als Verrat gelten. Ihr könnt uns wegen Subordination erschießen lassen, aber wir weichen nicht von Eurer Seite."

languages.text: 「失礼ながら、その同じ条文には、指揮官が危機にあるときの臆病と不作為もまた、反逆に当たると記されています。我々を抗命の罪で銃殺になさるのは結構です。ですが、我々はあなたを見捨てはいたしません」
languages.original_text: "With all due respect, those same articles also state that cowardice and inaction when command is in peril also constitute treason. You may have us shot for insubordination, but we shall not abandon you."

traits.locale_text: 「失礼ながら、その同じ条文には、指揮官が危機にあるときの臆病と不作為もまた、反逆に当たると記されています。我々を抗命の罪で銃殺になさるのは結構です。ですが、我々はあなたを見捨てはいたしません」
